# parts

**Instance Property**

The individual parts of the MMS message.

## Declaration

```swift
var parts: [MMSPartContent]
```

## Discussion

When sending an MMS, add the individual parts to this array. When receiving an MMS, inspect this array to receive the MMS parts, in order.

## Accessing content properties

- **MMSPartContent**: A structure that defines custom headers within MMS content.
- **subject**: The subject of the MMS message.
- **headers**: Additional headers in a received MMS message, as a key-value dictionary of strings.
